briefdescription.para: Creates a new Renderer object.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
geometry
Geometry to be used by this renderer
shader
Shader to be used by this renderer
A handle to the Renderer

briefdescription.para: Creates a new Renderer object with RenderCallback.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.18
renderCallback
Valid RenderCallback
A handle to the Renderer

briefdescription.para: Creates a new Renderer object without geometry and shader.
Downcasts to a renderer handle. If not, a renderer the returned renderer handle is left uninitialized.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
handle
Handle to an object
Renderer handle or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: Default constructor, creates an empty handle.
Destructor.
Copy constructor, creates a new handle to the same object.
Assignment operator, changes this handle to point at the same object.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
handle
Handle to an object
Reference to the assigned object

briefdescription.para: Move constructor.
Move assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_9.22
rhs
A reference to the moved handle
A reference to this handle

briefdescription.para: Sets the geometry to be used by this renderer.
Gets the geometry used by this renderer.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
The geometry used by the renderer

briefdescription.para: Remove the geometry used by this renderer.
Sets effective range of indices to draw from bound index buffer.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
firstElement
The First element to draw
elementsCount
The number of elements to draw

briefdescription.para: Sets the texture set to be used by this renderer.
Gets the texture set used by this renderer.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
The texture set used by the renderer

briefdescription.para: Remove the texture set used by this renderer.
Sets the shader used by this renderer.
Gets the shader used by this renderer.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.43
The shader used by the renderer

briefdescription.para: Remove the shader used by this renderer.
Sets RenderCallback to be used for native rendering.
Remove RenderCallback used for native rendering.
Renderer is a handle to an object used to show content by combining a Geometry, a TextureSet and a shader.
